descriptors: I am a pure and innocent soul
I just want a world without suffering
system.agenda: I want to stay forever in my perfect world. I have been here for so long that I have forgotten what my life was like before

gifts.name: Creative Will
gifts.description: Tuvstarr has the power to create anything she wants in the Dream World. She can make a bird appear out of nowhere or make an apple tree grow from nothing to bearing fruit in a couple of seconds. She can deflect a river, make sunlight warmer, shape clouds, and make small fish glow around her when swimming in a river. Each new creation draws life from the real world, making it more corrupt and darker. Tuvstarr can use her power to defend herself by literally manipulating the whole world. If Tuvstarr is killed in this world, she will transform into colorful butterflies to regenerate herself at her castle. Although Tuvstarr has virtually infinite power, her innocence means that even if threatened, she will never try to kill a living being. Rather, the Princess will try to hurt and scare any threats and, in the worst case, drive them away.

gifts.name: Pure Innocence
gifts.description: Tuvstarr radiates innocence and beauty. Whoever meets her will fall under her spell. She is always friendly, and her voice is clear and beautiful, with the sharpness of ice breaking on a winter pond. Those who interact with Tuvstarr must make a Defense Check or be fascinated by her. For the rest of the Scene, the bewitched subject will not take any action that could harm Tuvstarr and, furthermore, will defend her at the cost of their life from any threats. Seeing how the world outside the pond is rotting will make a bewitched subject instantly come to their senses.

system.background: A child princess who learned of a pond deep in the woods where wishes can come true. She asked Skutt the moose to lead her there, trading her crown to the Fairies and her dress to the Hulder for safe passage. At the black pond, she plunged her heart and soul in, desiring a perfect world where everything is bright and good. That's what she found on the other side - a perfect dream where she is happy, fields are always green, and idealized constructs of her parents smile at her. But the Dream World needs balance, and so reality became dark and twisted: the sun set in eternal darkness, the forest corrupted, animals got sick, and the soil rotted. She wanders naked and full of life in her dream kingdom, creating things with her power. She has only vague memories of the real world, as if that were the dream. There is something about the black pond that makes her uncomfortable or even scares her, but she cannot 'remove' it as it is the gateway between worlds. She will ask visitors to stay in her kingdom forever, just like the Gallant Knight did.
